title: New Potions & Effects+
description: This modification adds new effects to potions! For example, a detonation potion that explodes a player or creature at the end of the effect!
body:
This modification adds new effects to potions! For example, a detonation potion that explodes a player or creature at the end of the effect! Or an invulnerability potion that makes you completely invulnerable to any damage! (while the effect lasts!) And many other effects with which you can do anything!

❗RECIPES ALL POTIONS❗:

Potion Of Detonation = 1x Clock TNT (New Item!) & Potion (MUNDANE)

Potion Of Invulnerability = 1x Enchanted Golden Apple & Potion (INVISIBILITY)

Potion Of Melting = 1x Lava Bucket & Potion (MUNDANE)

Potion Of Infection = 1x Pufferfish & Bottle Water

Potion Of Immunization = 1x Golden Apple & Potion (MUNDANE)

Potion Of Curse = 1x Wither Rose & Potion (AWKWARD)

Clock TNT (NEW ITEM) = 1x Redstone,1x TNT & CLOCK

Potion Of Infection 2 = 1x Redstone & Potion Of Infection

Potion Of Curse 2 = 1x Redstone & Potion Of Curse

Potion Of Instant Hunger = 1x Rotten Flash & Potion (AWKWARD)

Potion Of Endowment = 1x Experience Bottle & Potion (MUNDANE)
